3068090.name: Wänder OutWorld - Mount Hollow
3068090.description:
Follow the life of Wander, a girl born in an island in the middle of nowhere, a place filled with paranormal activity and conspiracies. While the power she inherits is deeply rooted in mystery and hold dangerous potential, many evil forces and challenges await her.

Wänder OutWorld - Mount Hollow is an open world 2D ARPG game with bullet hell and horror themes. It offers a scary, crazy adventure that ties both past, present and future into its threads. Many hidden secrets and mysteries to solve, puzzles and decisions to make.

Open World - At the Isle of Ila, Wander, our protagonist, has a lot to do. Walk around in the town of Corila, help the residents. Explore the forests and fields, fight through enemy encounters and dungeons. 

Switch realities - While standing in key spots, it is possible to traverse a bubble where a magic reality is glimpsed experienced, visited and interacted with, expanding the world and the adventure.

Crafting - With a big inventory, the player will be able to craft lots of equipment, including armour sets that can be dyed.

Play Mount Hollow!! - This game has an awesome feature, a game inside a game, tied to the plot and progress. A lot of room for cool mechanics ;D

Mount Hollow is a bit more linear and action packed, contrasting the more open world and exploration approach of Wänder OutWorld. As it progresses in rooms and levels. Its also different in style, its pixel art and played in her fictional portable console. But it has many of the same features as the other one and plays mostly the same, gameplay wise.

Enough spoilers for now!!

Thank you for reading this short letter!! Thank you for the support and I hope to see you at release!!
3068090.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
